16120457.name: Armor Energy Capacity
16120457.description: This armor can accept armor mods up to a total cost equal to or below its energy capacity.

119204074.name: Fragment Cost
119204074.description: The energy used by your build to activate fragments.

144602215.name: Super
144602215.description: Increases the amount of Super energy from all sources.

155624089.name: Stability
155624089.description: How much or little recoil you will experience while firing the weapon.

209426660.name: Guard Resistance
209426660.description: Damage reduction while guarding with this weapon against most attacks.

237763788.name: Ghost Energy Capacity
237763788.description: This Ghost can accept any Ghost mods.

360359141.name: Durability
360359141.description: Higher Durability allows your vehicle to take more damage before failing.

392767087.name: Health
392767087.description: Increases the amount of health you gain each time you pick up an Orb of Power. Reduces flinching from incoming fire while aiming a weapon.

447667954.name: Draw Time
447667954.description: The time in milliseconds it takes to draw an arrow. Release an arrow when fully drawn for maximum damage and speed.

514071887.name: Mod Cost
514071887.description: This Ghost can accept any Ghost mods.

602570185.name: Vent Speed
602570185.description: The time it takes to vent this weapon.

925767036.name: Ammo Capacity
925767036.description: How many powerful attacks this weapon can launch before ammo is depleted

943549884.name: Handling
943549884.description: The speed with which the weapon can be readied and aimed.

1240592695.name: Range
1240592695.description: Increases the effective range of this weapon.

1345609583.name: Aim Assistance
1345609583.description: The weapon's ability to augment your aim.

1480404414.name: Attack
1480404414.description: Higher Attack allows your weapons to damage higher-level opponents.

1501155019.name: Speed
1501155019.description: How fast this vehicle travels over land.

1546607977.name: Heroic Resistance
1546607977.description: Provides additional damage resistance while your Super is active.

1546607978.name: Arc Damage Resistance
1546607978.description: Reduces all incoming damage while your Super is active. Reduces incoming Arc damage from combatants.

1546607979.name: Solar Damage Resistance
1546607979.description: Reduces all incoming damage while your Super is active. Reduces incoming Solar damage from combatants.

1546607980.name: Void Damage Resistance
1546607980.description: Reduces all incoming damage while your Super is active. Reduces incoming Void damage from combatants.

1591432999.name: Accuracy
1591432999.description: How well shots fired by this weapon hit their target.

1735777505.name: Grenade
1735777505.description: Reduces your grenade ability cooldown. Increases the amount of grenade energy from all sources.

1842278586.name: Shield Duration
1842278586.description: How long this weapon's shield can be raised.

1931675084.name: Ammo Generation
1931675084.description: Ammo progress earned for final blows with this weapon. Primary weapons generate the most progress. Heavy and Special weapons generate additional progress towards the ammo type that they do not use.

1935470627.name: Power
1935470627.description: Raising your Power increases the damage your abilities deal against higher-level combatants.

1943323491.name: Class
1943323491.description: Reduces your class ability cooldown. Increases the amount of class ability energy provided by all sources.

2018193158.name: Armor Energy Capacity
2018193158.description: This armor can accept armor mods up to a total cost equal to or below its energy capacity.

2135857333.name: Class
2135857333.description: Reduces your class ability cooldown. Increases the amount of class ability energy provided by all sources.

2223994109.name: Aspect Energy Capacity
2223994109.description: The energy used by your build to activate fragments.

2441327376.name: Armor Energy Capacity
2441327376.description: This armor can accept armor mods up to a total cost equal to or below its energy capacity.

2523465841.name: Velocity
2523465841.description: Increases the speed of projectiles fired by this weapon.

2714457168.name: Airborne Effectiveness
2714457168.description: How accurate and stable this weapon is while airborne.

2715839340.name: Recoil Direction
2715839340.description: The weapon's tendency to move while firing.

2733264856.name: Score Multiplier
2733264856.description: Amount by which the current handicap is increasing score values.

2762071195.name: Guard Efficiency
2762071195.description: Reduces the amount of energy required to guard an attack.

2837207746.name: Swing Speed
2837207746.description: The speed at which you can launch attacks.

2961396640.name: Charge Time
2961396640.description: The time in milliseconds before a weapon fires.

2996146975.name: Weapons
2996146975.description: Increases weapon reload speed and handling. Increases weapon damage against minor and major combatants.

3017642079.name: Boost
3017642079.description: How much speed can be gained from boosting.

3022301683.name: Charge Rate
3022301683.description: How fast this weapon recharges its energy.

3085395333.name: Persistence
3085395333.description: Increases the amount of time that bolts fired by this weapon will linger before expiring.

3289069874.name: Power Bonus
3289069874.description: The Seasonal Artifact increases your Power, increasing the damage your abilities deal against higher-level combatants.

3481294762.name: Heat Generated
3481294762.description: The amount of heat generated per shot fired.

3493869314.name: Melee
3493869314.description: Reduces your melee cooldown. Increases the amount of melee energy from all sources.

3555269338.name: Zoom
3555269338.description: How much the weapon's scope can zoom in on targets.

3597844532.name: Precision Damage
3597844532.description: Damage when striking a target's weak points.

3614673599.name: Blast Radius
3614673599.description: Increases the explosion radius of this weapon.

3625423501.name: Armor Energy Capacity
3625423501.description: This armor can accept armor mods up to a total cost equal to or below its energy capacity.

3736848092.name: Guard Endurance
3736848092.description: How long you can maintain your guard with this weapon.

3871231066.name: Magazine
3871231066.description: The number of shots which can be fired before reloading.

3897883278.name: Defense
3897883278.description: Reduces incoming damage from your enemies.

3950461274.name: Armor Energy Capacity
3950461274.description: This armor can accept armor mods up to a total cost equal to or below its energy capacity.

3988418950.name: Time to Aim Down Sights
3988418950.description: Speed while aiming down the sights.

4006394725.name: Cooling Efficiency
4006394725.description: How quickly the weapon cools per second when not being fired.

4043523819.name: Impact
4043523819.description: Increases the damage inflicted by each round.

4188031367.name: Reload Speed
4188031367.description: The time it takes to reload this weapon.

4244567218.name: Melee
4244567218.description: Reduces your melee cooldown. Increases the amount of melee energy from all sources.

4284893193.name: Rounds Per Minute
4284893193.description: The number of shots per minute this weapon can fire.
